response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 16+ years of experience exceeding the stated requirement, he has critical gaps for this role. His C++ expertise is severely outdated—last significant work was at National Instruments in 2015. His entire recent career (2015–present) has focused on web and backend systems (TypeScript, Node.js, D), with no evidence of MQTT, message brokers, IoT, industrial automation, or IEC 62443 security expertise. The domain mismatch and C++ currency deficit would require substantial retraining for an industrial automation role.
strengths: 16+ years of software development experience exceeding the 8–12 year requirement, demonstrating deep architectural thinking and scalability expertise
Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring capability, evidenced by organizing refactoring dojos, creating training courses, and advocating for TDD and CI/CD practices
Proven ability to design and deliver complex systems (real-time applications, distributed platforms, microservices handling millions of requests/second)
concerns: C++ expertise is severely outdated; last significant work was over 10 years ago; recent career entirely in TypeScript/Node.js web and backend systems
Missing critical role requirements: no MQTT, message-broker, IoT, or industrial automation experience; no exposure to IEC 62443 standards or industrial cybersecurity
Education does not match stated requirement; holds BS Computer Science but second degree is in Photography/Video/Image Processing, not B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in engineering

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and IoT domain expertise
Overall engineering maturity and system design capability
